languages.text: Служа династии верой и правдой, в одном из боев архмилитант Ведка Дунавски получила тяжелые увечья. По приказу Лорд-капитана она продолжила службу, претерпев многочисленные аугментации и став знаменосцем династии. В своем рвении Ведка потребовала имплантировать знамя фон Валанциус себе в позвоночник, чтобы враги знали — династия никогда не склонится перед ними, в ее случае буквально. Нескончаемо прославляя династию ее гимном, звучащим из имплантированных в глотку воксов, она совершила множество подвигов, движимая истовой верой в Бога-Императора и династию, пока в глубокой старости ее не признали благословенной сподвижницей. Ослабленный старостью и постоянной болью от имплантов разум под конец жизни Ведки помнил только одно – положения из Устава, которые она выкрикивала до самой смерти.

In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, she was elevated to the station of the dynasty's standard-bearer. In her searing zeal, Vedka demanded the von Valancius banner be grafted onto her very spine as a testament that the dynasty would never bow before its foes — in her case, quite literally. Endlessly proclaiming the dynasty's glory through voxes implanted in her throat, she went on to perform many feats, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. As her final days approached, weakened by decrepitude and unrelenting pain from her implants, Vedka could recall only one thing: the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.
languages.original_text: Служа династии верой и правдой, в одном из боев архмилитант Ведка Дунавски получила тяжелые увечья. По приказу Лорд-капитана она продолжила службу, претерпев многочисленные аугментации и став знаменосцем династии. In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.

languages.text: 王朝への忠実なる奉仕の最中、アーチ・ミリタントのヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは戦場で重傷を負った。ロード・キャプテンは彼女に奉仕を続けるよう命じ、幾度もの強化を耐え抜いた末、ヴェドカは可動式の戦闘王座に安置された。多数のサーヴィターに引かれて戦場を渡り歩いた彼女は、その身体にもかかわらず、神帝と王朝への篤き信仰に突き動かされ、なおも数々の武勲を打ち立て、やがて晩年の深きころには祝福された信徒として認められるに至った。老衰と、インプラントの絶え間なき苦痛に蝕まれ、最期の日々が近づくにつれ、ヴェドカが思い出せるのはただ一つ――手引書の規定のみであり、彼女は息を引き取るその時までそれを唱え続けた。
languages.original_text: In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、王朝に忠誠を誓い、その生涯を尽くした。しかし、彼女は、宇宙旅行への熱意が異端の分裂の始まりだと見込んだ、最も親しい部下によって裏切られ、殺害された。

王朝への忠実なる奉仕の最中、アーチ・ミリタントのヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは戦場で重傷を負った。ロード・キャプテンは彼女に奉仕を続けるよう命じ、幾度もの強化を耐え抜いた末、ヴェドカは可動式の戦闘王座に安置された。多数のサーヴィターに引かれて戦場を渡り歩いた彼女は、その身体にもかかわらず、神帝と王朝への篤き信仰に突き動かされ、なおも数々の武勲を打ち立て、やがて晩年の深きころには祝福された信徒として認められるに至った。老衰と、インプラントの絶え間なき苦痛に蝕まれ、最期の日々が近づくにつれ、ヴェドカが思い出せるのはただ一つ――手引書の規定のみであり、彼女は息を引き取るその時までそれを唱え続けた。

languages.text: 在为王朝尽忠的岁月中，首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡在战斗中身负重伤。舰长大人命她继续服役，于是在经历了无数次改造之后，薇德卡被安置在一座移动战斗平台上，被机仆们拖行着辗转各个战场。她虽然身负重创，却仍凭着对神皇和王朝的虔诚信仰屡建功勋。到了暮年，她被尊为蒙受恩典的信徒。在植入物带来的持续疼痛和衰老的折磨下，她日渐虚弱。临近生命终点之际，薇德卡只记得一件事——《手册》上的各项规章，她反复诵读，直至生命终结。
languages.original_text: In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.

traits.locale_text: 在为王朝尽忠的岁月中，首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡在战斗中身负重伤。舰长大人命她继续服役，于是在经历了无数次改造之后，薇德卡被安置在一座移动战斗平台上，被机仆们拖行着辗转各个战场。她虽然身负重创，却仍凭着对神皇和王朝的虔诚信仰屡建功勋。到了暮年，她被尊为蒙受恩典的信徒。在植入物带来的持续疼痛和衰老的折磨下，她日渐虚弱。临近生命终点之际，薇德卡只记得一件事——《手册》上的各项规章，她反复诵读，直至生命终结。

languages.text: Au cours de ses années de combat au service de la dynastie, l'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski subit de terribles blessures. {Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} lui ordonnant de continuer à servir, elle endura alors d'innombrables augmentations et finit enchâssée dans un trône de bataille mobile. Tirée à travers les champs de bataille par une horde de servitors, mue par sa foi inébranlable en l'Empereur-Dieu et la dynastie, elle accomplit par la suite de nombreux exploits en dépit de son état, jusqu'à ce qu'à un âge très avancé, elle soit enfin considérée comme une disciple bénie. Accablée par la sénescence, percluse de douleur causée par ses implants et sentant la mort approcher, Vedka ne se souvenait plus de rien, si ce n'étaient les règles du Manuel, qu'elle continua à déclamer jusqu'à son dernier soupir.
languages.original_text: In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.

traits.locale_text: Au cours de ses années de combat au service de la dynastie, l'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski subit de terribles blessures. {Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} lui ordonnant de continuer à servir, elle endura alors d'innombrables augmentations et finit enchâssée dans un trône de bataille mobile. Tirée à travers les champs de bataille par une horde de servitors, mue par sa foi inébranlable en l'Empereur-Dieu et la dynastie, elle accomplit par la suite de nombreux exploits en dépit de son état, jusqu'à ce qu'à un âge très avancé, elle soit enfin considérée comme une disciple bénie. Accablée par la sénescence, percluse de douleur causée par ses implants et sentant la mort approcher, Vedka ne se souvenait plus de rien, si ce n'étaient les règles du Manuel, qu'elle continua à déclamer jusqu'à son dernier soupir.

L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie jusqu'au jour où elle fut tuée par l'un de ses subalternes les plus proches, qui avait cru reconnaître les germes d'un schisme hérétique dans sa passion pour le voyage interstellaire.

languages.text: En el leal desempeño de su servicio a la dinastía, la archimilitante Vedka Dunawski resultó gravemente herida en combate. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán declaró que su servicio debía continuar, y con ese fin, tras someterse a numerosos aumentos corporales, Vedka acabó confinada en un trono de batalla móvil. Acarreada por el campo de batalla sobre los hombros de una hueste de servidores, Dunawski obró grandes proezas a pesar de su estado, espoleada por el fervor de su fe en el Dios Emperador y en la dinastía, hasta que finalmente fue canonizada en el ocaso de su vida. Debilitada a causa de la decrepitud y del constante suplicio que le provocaban sus implantes, en sus últimos días Vedka solo podía pensar en una cosa: las normativas del manual que repitió una y otra vez hasta exhalar su último suspiro.
languages.original_text: In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.

traits.locale_text: En el leal desempeño de su servicio a la dinastía, la archimilitante Vedka Dunawski resultó gravemente herida en combate. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán declaró que su servicio debía continuar, y con ese fin, tras someterse a numerosos aumentos corporales, Vedka acabó confinada en un trono de batalla móvil. Acarreada por el campo de batalla sobre los hombros de una hueste de servidores, Dunawski obró grandes proezas a pesar de su estado, espoleada por el fervor de su fe en el Dios Emperador y en la dinastía, hasta que finalmente fue canonizada en el ocaso de su vida. Debilitada a causa de la decrepitud y del constante suplicio que le provocaban sus implantes, en sus últimos días Vedka solo podía pensar en una cosa: las normativas del manual que repitió una y otra vez hasta exhalar su último suspiro.

languages.text: Hanedanlığa olan sadık hizmeti sırasında Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, savaşta ağır yaralar aldı. Lord Kaptan onun hizmet etmeye devam etmesini emretti ve böylece sayısız ogmentasyona katlandıktan sonra Vedka, seyyar bir savaş tahtına oturtuldu. Bir hizmetör ordusu tarafından savaş alanlarına çekilerek, durumuna rağmen Tanrı İmparator'a ve hanedanlığa olan sarsılmaz inancıyla hareket edip birçok kahramanca davranış sergiledi. Ömrünün son demlerinde kutsanmış bir mürit ilan edildi. Yaşlılık ve implantlarının bitmek bilmeyen acısıyla zayıf düşen Vedka, son günleri yaklaşırken sadece tek bir şeyi hatırlayabiliyordu: Son nefesine kadar haykırdığı El Kitabı yönetmeliklerini.
languages.original_text: In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlığa olan sadık hizmeti sırasında Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, savaşta ağır yaralar aldı. Lord Kaptan onun hizmet etmeye devam etmesini emretti ve böylece sayısız ogmentasyona katlandıktan sonra Vedka, seyyar bir savaş tahtına oturtuldu. Bir hizmetör ordusu tarafından savaş alanlarına çekilerek, durumuna rağmen Tanrı İmparator'a ve hanedanlığa olan sarsılmaz inancıyla hareket edip birçok kahramanca davranış sergiledi. Ömrünün son demlerinde kutsanmış bir mürit ilan edildi. Yaşlılık ve implantlarının bitmek bilmeyen acısıyla zayıf düşen Vedka, son günleri yaklaşırken sadece tek bir şeyi hatırlayabiliyordu: Son nefesine kadar haykırdığı El Kitabı yönetmeliklerini.

languages.text: Während ihres treuen Dienstes für die Dynastie erlitt Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski in der Schlacht schwere Verletzungen. Der Lord Captain befahl ihr, weiter zu dienen, und so wurde Vedka nach verschiedenen Augmentationen auf einen mobilen Kampfthron gesetzt. Von zahllosen Servitoren getragen, vollbrachte sie trotz ihres Zustandes — getrieben von ihrem feurigen Glauben an den Gottimperator und die Dynastie — noch so manche Heldentat, ehe sie im Herbst ihrer Jahre als gesegnete Geweihte anerkannt wurde. Als sie von Altersschwäche und dem unablässigen Schmerz ihrer Implantate gezeichnet ihren letzten Tagen entgegensah, erinnerte sich Vedka nur an eines ... die Bestimmungen des Handbuchs, die sie bis zu ihrem letzten Atemzug verkündete.
languages.original_text: In the course of her faithful service to the dynasty, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski suffered grievous injuries in battle. The Lord Captain bade that she continue to serve, and so, after enduring numerous augmentations, Vedka was enshrined on a mobile battle throne. Drawn across battlefields by a host of servitors, she went on to perform many feats despite her condition, propelled by her devout faith in the God-Emperor and the dynasty, until, deep in her twilight years, she was recognised as a blessed votary. Weakened by decrepitude and the unrelenting pain from her implants, as her final days approached, Vedka could recall only one thing — the regulations of the Handbook, which she called out until her dying breath.
